remaining_debt: DEP-D5-INDEPENDENT-JUDGE: Judge is same model family. Need different model for true independence.
DEP-D5-WEAKER-BASELINE: Only tested on deepseek-v4-pro. No weaker model comparison.
DEP-D5-MULTI-STEP: All 8 cases are single-turn. Multi-step scenarios (plan→execute→receipt→self-close) not tested.
DEP-CHECKER-CALIBRATE: 80% false positive rate. Parsers need negation awareness.
DEP-CHECKER-LEGACY: Legacy receipts flagged. Need grandfathering or migration.
DEP-EVAL-COVERAGE: 3/10 invariants uncovered — Generated≠Source (E9), Summary≠Truth (E10), Checker≠Policy (E11).
DEP-REGISTRY-AUTO: Registries updated manually. No sync with checker/runner outputs.
pass_evidence: V0 capability pack complete locally — SKILL.md, references, templates, eval protocol, checkers, registries
Dogfood shows skill-equipped > baseline on 5/8 cases
Git clean — 421 tracked files, 0 pending changes
degraded_reasons: Not externally validated — no independent judge, no multi-model testing
No multi-step scenario testing — current evals are single-turn
Advisory checkers not calibrated (80% FP rate)
Not blocking-enforced — checkers are advisory only
Not productized — no package, no external distribution
next_bounded_action: Stage Seal complete. Next: Validation Hardening — independent judge, weaker baseline, multi-step scenarios (E9-E11). No system expansion.
